author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Plan: Add ~15 missing GPU kernels to the GpuBackend trait and implement them. The design doc says CubeCL but CubeCL is alpha and would require rearchitecting the backend. Pragmatic approach: continue with hand-written PTX strings (proven pattern, 14 kernels already work this way) and add the missing ops. This unblocks Phase 5 (eliminate GPU backward roundtrips). Kernels needed: div_f32, exp_f32, log_f32, sqrt_f32, pow_f32, abs_f32, sigmoid_f32, tanh_f32, sum_axis_f32, sigmoid_backward_f32, tanh_backward_f32, softmax_backward_f32.
